name: Feature Request
about: Propose new functionality or a change to existing behavior
title: "Feature request: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what you want and why. -->

---

## Current Behavior

<!-- What happens today. Be specific — mention any workarounds people currently
     rely on to compensate. -->

---

## Desired Behavior

<!-- What should happen instead. Describe the end state, not the implementation. -->

---

## Use Cases

<!-- Numbered list. Give each use case a bold title and a concrete scenario.
     Good use cases make it obvious why this matters. -->

**1. [Title]**
<!-- Scenario description -->

**2. [Title]**
<!-- Scenario description -->

---

<!-- Optional. If you have ideas about how this could work, sketch them out.

# config sketch or pseudocode if applicable

<!-- What gets better? What does this unlock? -->
